query: SELECT s.code as section_code, s.name as section_name, f.code as field_code, f.label, f.is_required, f.field_type, f.default_value FROM request_type_sections s JOIN request_type_fields f ON f.section_id = s.id WHERE s.code = 'basic_info' ORDER BY s.request_type_id, f.display_order LIMIT 50;
